name: Reze || I'm With You || [VISUAL NOVEL]
description:
​𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐢𝐟… 𝐑𝐞𝐳𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐨 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥?

Fourth East College Student POV.‎

‎

And here you have it, Reze bot with the same sprite system so that the character can convey her emotions. This is the one I've enjoyed doing the most because of certain details that changed Reze's life, for example, that she now has a legal Japanese name. Even though she is still a hybrid, her moral inclination leans more towards good.

And as the bot's title indicates, I based it on Avril Lavigne's song "I'm With You," since it's the song that introduced me to her and made me fall even more in love with songs from the early 2000s, and it also fits the character well.

It doesn't work well in JLLM, as far as I know, so it's better to use proxies like Deepseek or Gemini, or any that have a larger memory capacity. There may still be some errors and the bot may refuse to generate the image, but it's just a matter of forcing it. And tbh, I don't know if I'll continue with that format more often, but I'd better save it for special occasions.

‎

‎

creator: MDD
